title: The Legend of Zelda Wind Waker: Phantom Ganon (Primera lucha / First Fight)
description:
Español: El videojuego es "The legend of zelda Wind waker" para nintendo gamecube. Esta es la pelea contra phantom ganon cuando llegas a forsaken fortress con la Master Sword. ESTE VIDEO FUE GRABADO Y JUGADO POR MI, UTILIZANDO UN GRABADOR DE DVD EN UN WII. 

Datos sobre la mascara: La "hero's charm" es una mascara que te permite ver la vida restante del enemigo en una barra encima de el, la obtienes dandole alrededor de 40 o 50 collares de mariposa a la profesora en windfall island. 

English: The videogame is "The legend of zelda wind waker" for nintendo gamecube. In this video, I battle phantom ganon for the first time when I reach forsaken fortress with the master sword. THIS VIDEO WAS RECORDED AND PLAYED BY ME, USING A DVD RECORDER FROM A WII. Enjoy!

Data about the mask: the "hero's charm" its a mask that allows you to see the enemy's remaining life in a bar above its head. You obtain it by giving around 40 or 50 joy pendants (the butterfly pendant) to the teacher on windfall island.
